---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A concise description of what you'd like added or changed.

## Motivation

Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed behavior

Describe how you'd expect it to work — command syntax, output format, flags, etc.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you prefer this one.
